evaluation.split: PTB-XL strat_fold (patient-grouped): train folds 1-8, val fold 9, test fold 10

max_safety.name: Maximum Safety Mode
max_safety.description: Prioritizes never missing an MI; accepts a high false-alarm rate.

high_safety.name: High Safety Mode
high_safety.description: Balanced ED triage; catches ~97% of MIs with manageable false alarms.

balanced.name: Balanced Mode
balanced.description: Efficient screening with fewer false alarms.

disclaimer: Research prototype only. Not a medical device; not FDA/CE cleared; not for clinical use.
